eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Nance, NE; at 04:04 PM ON APR 14, 2026 Effective until 05:04 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Genoa residents can resume using water. Water will be chlorinated for a short while. Bottled water can be picked up at the old fire hall from 7-8pm tonight. Please do not water lawn or garden in the meantime.
